title: GrimPotionStatus
description:
PotionStatusHUD

PotionStatusHUD is a highly customizable HUD mod that lets you see all your active potion effects in real time, including duration, level, and icons — all displayed clearly on your screen while you play.
body:
GrimPotionStatus

PotionStatusHUD is a highly customizable HUD mod that lets you see all your active potion effects in real time, including duration, level, and icons — all displayed clearly on your screen while you play.

Whether you're in PvP, PvE, or just exploring, you’ll always know exactly what effects are active and how long they’ll last. Discord Support server https://discord.gg/UE8nwGbYwt
